coach_notes: The most critical gaps are classroom management, lesson planning, and early childhood education, as these are foundational for any arts-media role involving children, such as teaching or leading creative workshops. Without these, you cannot effectively structure activities or ensure a safe, productive learning environment. To bridge these, consider taking a short online course in early childhood education basics and volunteering to assist in a classroom setting to gain hands-on experience.

jobs.title: Summer Camp Counselor - Memorial Jr. High
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your childcare and communication skills directly apply to camp counselor duties. Experience with activities and organization supports planning and supervising children.
jobs.gaps: No specific experience with summer camps or working with middle schoolers mentioned. May need to highlight any relevant youth group or volunteer work.

jobs.why: Childcare and activity experience directly apply to extended day assistant role. Communication and organization skills support program coordination.
jobs.gaps: No specific extended day or after-school program experience. May need to demonstrate ability to manage groups of children in a structured setting.

jobs.gaps: No formal teaching or classroom aide experience. Lacks specific bilingual education or school setting background. May need to develop understanding of instructional strategies.
